subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Ibrahim
subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost inquire! Know thou that there hath appeared before Us a letter from one who hath been enkindled with the fire of God, and therein We found [3.5s]... ...It hath been decreed by Us that the Word of God and all the potentialities thereof shall be manifested unto men in strict conformity with such conditions
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ایها السائل فاعلم بان حضر بین یدینا کتاب من الذی اشتعل بنار الله و وجدنا فیه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transcendence; unknowability of God
